alerts.title: Example announcement

alerts.title: OnePlus 15 ARB Warning
alerts.message: Example: Latest firmware CPH2747_16.0.8.300 is safe with ARB=0. Always check before downgrading.

alerts.title: OnePlus 13 ARB = 1
alerts.message: Example: OnePlus 13 Global firmware 16.0.8.301 has ARB=1. Downgrade is NOT recommended.
